license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jn5cmg6
title: TSS Transformation (Chung et al., 1989, PNAS 86:2172-2175)
author: Dennis DD Dienst

steps_raw.instruction: Inoculate starter culture of 1.5 mL LB medium in ~13 mL test tube
Incubate at 37°C on shaking device (> 200 rpm)
After 1.5 – 2 hours culture should become slightly turbid (exponential growth)
Add 0.5 – 1.0 µL plasmid from mini prep (high copy: rather 0.3 µL)
Incubate 45-60 min at 37°C on shaking device (> 200 rpm) – addition of LB is not requested
Work on ice: add 200 mL of culture to 1.5 mL tube and mix with 200 mL 2 x TSS ( dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gt3bwqn )
